name: slo-queue-resync-failures
description: Alert when queue resync failure rate exceeds 0.5% over 10 minutes.
query: customEvents | where tostring(customDimensions.category) == 'queue_resync' | where tostring(customDimensions.source) == 'operator_queue' | extend payload=todynamic(customDimensions.metadataJson) | summarize total=count(), failed=countif(tostring(customDimensions.message) has 'failed' or tostring(payload.error) != '') by bin(timestamp, 10m), workCenter=tostring(payload.workCenterId) | extend failure_pct=iff(total==0, 0.0, todouble(failed) * 100.0 / todouble(total))
